permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Connects to the app's relay service (car-proxy.berrydev.co.uk) to fetch vehicle status and send remote commands to your car. Sign-in details stay on this phone and are sent encrypted per request; the relay stores no personal data. The help and privacy-policy links open in your phone's browser.

permissions.name: location
permissions.desc: Used only by "Find my car": reads this phone's position to show the direction and distance to where your car last reported it parked. The calculation happens entirely on this phone - your location is never sent to any server and is not stored, and is read only while the finder is open.
